heading: Demonstrations of heating or cooling residential housing utilizing solar energy
label: 1701z–5 Demonstrations of heating or cooling residential housing utilizing solar energy
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Housing and Urban Development Act of 1970, and not as part of the National Housing Act which comprises this chapter.

Amendments1986—Subsec. (c). struck out subsec. (c) which related to reports to Congress by Secretary not later than 6 months following close of year in which the Secretary carried out demonstration under this section.Pub. L. 99–386
amendments: Amendments1986—Subsec. (c). struck out subsec. (c) which related to reports to Congress by Secretary not later than 6 months following close of year in which the Secretary carried out demonstration under this section.Pub. L. 99–386

children.heading: Consultation by Secretary with National Science Foundation; scope of demonstrations; powers of Secretary
children.label: a Consultation by Secretary with National Science Foundation; scope of demonstrations; powers of Secretary

children.text: to enter into contracts with, to make grants to, and to provide other types of assistance to individuals and entities with special competence and knowledge to contribute to the planning, design, development, and operation of such housing;
to utilize the contract, loan, or mortgage insurance authority of any federally assisted housing program in the actual planning, development, and occupancy of such housing; and

to set aside any development, construction, design, or occupancy requirements for the purpose of any demonstration under this section if he determines that such requirements inhibit such demonstration.

children.heading: Evaluation by Secretary
children.label: b Evaluation by Secretary
children.text: The Secretary shall include in any demonstration under this section an evaluation of the demonstration to cover the full experience involved in all stages of the demonstration.
